candidate_descriptions.reference_multimodal: Exact Step 010.3 multimodal architecture, retrained under the same controlled multi-seed protocol.
candidate_descriptions.relation_aware_multimodal: Adds elementwise product and absolute-difference relation features between equal-width text and image representations.
candidate_descriptions.regularized_relation_multimodal: Uses relation features with stronger dropout, a smaller fusion layer, and a lower learning rate to reduce overfitting.
